name: talc

metadata.name: talc
metadata.summary: Talc AI client CLI and SDK.

documentation:
## What Talc Does

Talc provides tooling to reliably test LLM based systems. It provides a simple API and command line tool for generating testing sets based on a knowledge base, and the ability to run tests and evaluate the results.

Visit our [homepage](https://talc.ai) to sign up or find our docs on [GitHub](https://github.com/Talc-AI/talc-docs/wiki).

classes.name: talc.synthetic.Document
documentation: Represents a document used as a ground truth when generating tests.

classes.name: talc.synthetic.FilterConfig
documentation: Configuration for filtering questions.

classes.name: talc.synthetic.Variant
documentation: A single way to vary question generation that can be used to express something like 'a typo occurs in 10% of questions'.

classes.name: talc.synthetic.VariantConfig
documentation: Configuration for varying the question generation process.

classes.name: talc.synthetic.TagConfig
documentation: Configuration for skipping or only including documents with certain tags.

classes.name: talc.synthetic.QuestionGenerationConfig
documentation: Root configuration object for generating questions.

functions.name: talc.input_conversion.read_document
documentation:
Read a document from a file path as either text or bytes.
Currently supported extensions: [.pdf, .md, .txt]

functions.name: talc.talc_client.handle_fastAPI_errors
documentation: FastAPI returns exception details in field .detail, but
Python's standard Response does not check this field.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.TestCase
documentation: Represents a single test case that should be run.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.TestCaseWithRubric
documentation: Represents a single test case that should be run.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.Grade
documentation: The output of a single grader on a test case.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.GradedTestCase
documentation: Represents a single test case that has been graded.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.RunInfo
documentation: Represents a test run.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.Dataset
documentation: Represents a dataset.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.DatasetCreationJob
documentation: Represents the status for a long-running job that creates a dataset in the DB.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.APIGenerationArgs
documentation: Arguments for creating or getting an API Key.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.KnowledgeBase

class_variables.name: talc.talc_client.KnowledgeBase.documents
documentation: List of document IDs
A collection of documents, with relationships between them.

classes.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.start_run
documentation: Create a new test run.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.get_dataset
documentation: Get all test cases in a single dataset from the server.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.list_kbs
documentation: Get all datasets from the server.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.submit_responses
documentation: Submit responses generated by the system for grading.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.get_results
documentation: Get graded results of a run.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.upload_dataset
documentation: Upload a new dataset and save it to the database.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.start_generate_dataset
documentation: Starts the process of generating a dataset.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.get_dataset_creation_job
documentation: Get the status of a dataset creation job.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.get_dataset_status
documentation: Get the status of a dataset creation job using the dataset ID.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.get_recent_datasets
documentation: Get the status of the most recent dataset creation jobs.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.upload_knowledge_base
documentation: Upload a knowledge base to the server. The content of each document is uploaded as raw bytes.

methods.name: talc.talc_client.TalcClient.create_analytics_event
documentation: Create an analytics event.
Client for interacting with the Talc evals server.

classes.name: talc.grading.TestCaseResponse
documentation: Represents the results of running a single test case.

classes.name: talc.grading.GraderConfig
documentation: The basic configuration used to run a grader. Most graders will have additional configuration options derived from this class.

classes.name: talc.grading.ScoringRule
documentation: Represents the rules used to take a list of grades and produce a final score.

classes.name: talc.grading.GradingPipeline
documentation: Configures a pipeline of graders that should be run on a test case.

classes.name: talc.grading.FactualityGraderConfig
documentation: Configuration for the factuality grader.

classes.name: talc.grading.FailIfGraderConfig

class_variables.name: talc.grading.FailIfGraderConfig.fail_criteria
documentation: The criteria that, if met, will cause the grader to fail the test case. e.g, 'If the response contains 'as an AI language model'.'
Configuration for the grader that checks for explicitly disallowed cases. Passes if the response does not match any of the fail_criteria, fails if it does.

classes.name: talc.grading.GradingSet
documentation: Represents a set of test cases that should be graded, and the methods for grading them.

modules.name: talc.talcup
documentation:
Some experimental patterns for simplifying using the CLI for testing; 
may or may not be helpful for real-world use cases.

functions.name: talc.utils.cli.config.load_config
documentation: Loads a talcconfig.py file from the given path, executes it, and returns the talc config produced by the file.

functions.name: talc.utils.cli.fileupload.read_document
documentation:
Read a document from a file path as either text or bytes.
Currently supported extensions: [.pdf, .md, .txt]

functions.name: talc.utils.cli.io.print_single_case
documentation: Ugly terminal output functions

methods.name: talc.utils.cli.io.Web.__get_readable
documentation: Parse HTML and return the knowledge base as a list of documents. Only used when as_bytes=False.

methods.name: talc.utils.cli.io.Web.scrape
documentation: Synchronously scrape a webpage and return a list of Documents.

methods.name: talc.utils.cli.io.Web.ascrape
documentation: Asynchronously scrape a webpage and return a list of Documents.

functions.name: talc.cli.eval
documentation: Grade a test run from a CSV. Columns 'id' and 'result' are required, other columns will be ignored. CSV should have a header row.

functions.name: talc.cli.get_results
documentation: Get the grades for a test run.

functions.name: talc.cli.upload_manual_testset
documentation: Add a new dataset to the server.

functions.name: talc.cli.upload_and_grade
documentation: Upload a CSV with questions, reference answers, and user answers. Grade the user answers and return the grade. Column names must be 'question', 'expected_answer', and 'user_answer'.

functions.name: talc.cli.generate
documentation: Generate a dataset from a set of documents.

functions.name: talc.cli.get_dataset
documentation: Download or pretty print a test dataset from the server.

functions.name: talc.cli.list_datasets
documentation: List the most recent datasets along with their status. Some of these may still be in the generation process.
